No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a tertiary-level independent project (Target 4.3), developing practical filmmaking, research, and communication skills essential for future employment (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters creativity and practical filmmaking skills for '獨立專題製作,' preparing students for employment and entrepreneurship in creative industries (Target 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's emphasis on '創作計畫' and '後期製作' using modern techniques fosters innovation and upgrades technological capabilities within the media industry (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Developing media production skills ('拍片基本知識') and the ability to express through symbols ('善用符號表達的能力') can support public access to information and fundamental freedoms (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly fosters '小組合作' and '團隊溝通能力,' which are foundational skills for building and engaging in effective multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
